title: Founding AI Engineer
description:
GetCrux (YC W24) is building AI-powered video intelligence for enterprise sales teams. We use Claude API and GPT-4 to analyse customer calls and generate structured insights. Looking for a founding engineer to own the AI pipeline end-to-end.

Stack: Python, FastAPI, LangChain, Claude API, OpenAI, PostgreSQL, React.
No hard experience requirement — we care about what you've built. Prior AI project experience is a plus.
Location: Bengaluru in-office (Koramangala).
label: strong_match

title: ML Engineer – Indic LLMs
description:
Sarvam AI is building India's first production-grade Indic LLMs. We're a Series A company backed by Lightspeed and Khosla Ventures.

Responsibilities: fine-tune and evaluate language models, build data pipelines for multilingual corpora, collaborate with research team on model alignment.
Stack: Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, CUDA, wandb.
1-2 years of experience preferred but not required for strong candidates.
Location: Bengaluru (HSR Layout).
label: good_match

title: Data Analyst
description:
Razorpay is India's leading payments infrastructure company. We're looking for a Data Analyst to join our risk team.

Responsibilities: build dashboards in Tableau and Looker, write SQL queries for business reporting, partner with product teams to track KPIs.
Stack: SQL, Python (pandas), Tableau, Looker.
0-1 years of experience. B.Tech in any discipline.
Location: Bengaluru.
label: weak_match

title: Senior Software Engineer – Payments Core
description:
Stripe is hiring a Senior Software Engineer to work on Payments Core infrastructure. This is an on-site role in our San Francisco headquarters.

Requirements: 5+ years of backend engineering experience, strong Ruby or Java background, experience with distributed systems at scale.
Compensation: $200k-$280k base + equity.
Location: San Francisco, CA — relocation assistance provided. Remote not available.
label: poor_match

title: AI Product Engineer (Intern / Entry-Level)
description:
Postman is adding AI features across its API development platform. We're looking for early-career engineers passionate about LLMs and developer tools.

Responsibilities: integrate LLM APIs into product features, build prompt engineering tooling, write backend Python services.
Stack: Python, Node.js, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, React.
0-1 years of experience. Computer science background preferred.
Location: Bengaluru (hybrid).
label: good_match
